integrationApiKeys.generatedDialogDescription: You will not be able to view this secret key again. Keep it secure, because anyone with this API key can make requests on your behalf.

integrationApiKeys.permissionsHelp: Choose All if the integration needs write access, or Read only if it should only read data.
integrationApiKeys.secretKeyHelp: Store this key somewhere secure. It can be used immediately after this dialog closes.

permissions.allDescription: Full read and write access to all available integration endpoints.
permissions.readOnlyDescription: For integrations that should only call read-only endpoints and must not create, update, or delete data.

serviceOverview.heading: 1. Service Overview
serviceOverview.body: VideoQ ("the Service") is a web-based platform operated by {{operatorName}} that allows users to upload videos, generate transcriptions, and interact with video content through AI-powered chat. By using the Service, you agree to these Terms of Service.

accountRegistration.heading: 2. Account Registration
accountRegistration.body: To use the Service, you must create an account by providing a valid email address, username, and password. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. If you are a minor, you must obtain parental or guardian consent before using this Service.

prohibitedUse.heading: 3. Prohibited Use
prohibitedUse.body:
You may not use the Service for any unlawful or unauthorized purpose. Prohibited activities include, but are not limited to:
- Uploading content that infringes on third-party intellectual property rights
- Uploading content that is illegal, harmful, or offensive
- Attempting to gain unauthorized access to the Service or its systems
- Using the Service to distribute spam or malicious software
- Reselling or redistributing the Service without authorization
- Excessive automated access, reverse engineering, or placing an unreasonable load on the Service

accountSuspension.heading: 4. Account Suspension and Termination
accountSuspension.body: We reserve the right to suspend or delete your account without prior notice if you violate these Terms of Service.

paymentAndBilling.heading: 5. Payment and Billing
paymentAndBilling.body: The Service offers free and paid subscription plans. Paid plans are billed monthly via credit card through Stripe. Prices are displayed in Japanese Yen (JPY) or US Dollars (USD). By subscribing to a paid plan, you authorize recurring monthly charges until you cancel.

cancellation.heading: 6. Cancellation and Refunds
cancellation.body: You may cancel your subscription at any time through the billing management page. Upon cancellation, you will continue to have access to paid features until the end of your current billing period. Due to the nature of digital services, refunds are not provided for partial billing periods.

intellectualProperty.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: You retain ownership of all content you upload to the Service. By uploading content, you grant us a limited license to process, store, and display your content solely for the purpose of providing the Service. The Service itself, including its design, code, and branding, is the intellectual property of the operator.

limitationOfLiability.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.body: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. We make no guarantees regarding the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of AI-generated responses. You use such content at your own risk. We are not responsible for any loss, corruption, or failure of backup of your data. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid to us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

serviceChanges.heading: 9. Service Modifications and Termination
serviceChanges.body: We may modify, suspend, or terminate all or part of the Service with prior notice.

governingLaw.heading: 10. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governingLaw.body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Japan. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court.

changes.heading: 11. Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify registered users via email or through the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

dataCollected.heading: 1. Data We Collect
dataCollected.body:
We collect the following types of information:
- Account information: email address, username, and password (hashed)
- Uploaded content: video files and generated transcriptions
- Usage data: chat messages, AI interaction history, and service usage statistics
- Payment information: processed securely by Stripe; we do not store credit card numbers
- Technical data: IP address, browser type, and access logs

purposeOfUse.heading: 2. Purpose of Use
purposeOfUse.body:
We use the collected information to:
- Provide and maintain the Service
- Process video transcriptions and AI chat responses
- Manage your account and subscription billing
- Improve the Service and develop new features
- Communicate with you regarding your account and service updates
- Ensure compliance with legal obligations

thirdPartySharing.heading: 3. Third-Party Services
thirdPartySharing.body:
We may share data with the following third-party services as necessary to operate the Service:
- Stripe: payment processing (name, email, payment details)
- OpenAI: video transcription (audio data) and AI chat functionality (chat messages)
- Neon: serverless PostgreSQL database (stores account information, video metadata, transcription data, chat history, usage statistics, etc.)
- Mailgun: email delivery service (used for system emails such as email verification and password reset; includes email address)
- AWS (SQS, Lambda): used for task queuing (SQS) and serverless processing (Lambda). Video files and related data are included.
- Cloudflare R2: used for video file storage.

These providers process data in accordance with their own privacy policies. Third-party services may process data on servers located outside of Japan. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

cookies.heading: 4. Cookies and Local Storage
cookies.body: The Service uses cookies and local storage for session management and authentication. These are essential for the Service to function properly. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.

dataRetention.heading: 5. Data Retention
dataRetention.body: Your account data and uploaded content are retained for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, your data will be removed from our systems within 30 days, except where retention is required by law. Chat history and usage logs may be retained in anonymized form for service improvement.

security.heading: 6. Security Measures
security.body: We take reasonable security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or digital storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

userRights.heading: 7. Your Rights
userRights.body:
You have the right to:
- Access the personal data we hold about you (e.g., name, email address)
- Request correction of inaccurate personal account information (AI-generated content such as transcriptions and chat responses is not covered)
- Request deletion of your account and associated data
- Export your data in a portable format
- Withdraw consent for data processing

To exercise these rights, please contact us at the email address below.

contact.heading: 8. Contact
contact.body:
For questions or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
Email:

hero.title: Search & Ask Questions About Lecture Videos with AI
hero.subtitle: Transcribe recorded lessons → Students ask in natural language → Jump straight to the right moment

findContent.problem: Students can't find what they need in long lecture videos
findContent.solution: Ask the AI "Where did you explain X?" and jump instantly to the exact moment

repeatQuestions.problem: Students keep asking the same questions over and over
repeatQuestions.solution: Share the video and let students find answers themselves with AI chat

lostLectures.problem: Whiteboard notes and verbal explanations leave no written record
lostLectures.solution: High-accuracy transcription via Whisper captures every word of your lecture

university.title: University Lecture Archive Management
university.description: Organize semester lectures into groups. Students use AI chat to pinpoint exactly what they need for review.

school.title: High School & Middle School Video Archive
school.description: Record and archive classes so absent students never fall behind — at minimal cost.

flipped.title: Flipped Classroom Pre-Study Videos
flipped.description: Distribute pre-study videos and let students ask the AI their questions before class begins.

groups.title: Organize Lessons with Video Groups
groups.description: Manage videos by subject, semester, or class. Even large lecture libraries stay easy to navigate.

sharing.title: Distribute via Share Links
sharing.description: Generate a share link in one click. Students access videos and AI chat without creating an account.

analytics.title: Track Learning with Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: See which videos get the most views to identify where students are struggling early.

cta.title: Start Transforming Your Classroom Videos Today
